# Information Systems Community Board

A tagged, de-duplicated board of posts from the AISWORLD mailing list —
the community list of the Association for Information Systems (AIS) —
covering academic jobs, faculty positions, and careers in Information
Systems and tech, calls for papers, conferences & workshops, journal
special issues, PhD & funding opportunities, and general discussion.
Unofficial, not affiliated with or endorsed by AIS or the AISWORLD
listserv.

Data source: AISWORLD public RSS feed, refreshed daily.
Each post links to its original listserv archive entry.
